title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Incident Case: Net Ipv4 Address Plan
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net ipv4 address plan increment in a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Document scopes, gateways, reservations, exclusions, VLANs, DHCP pools, static infrastructure, and IPAM ownership.
Recognize class A through E historical boundaries without using classful thinking to replace CIDR design.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
